features.title: Recall policy modes and fail-closed latency fallback
features.expected_gain: Explicit fast/balanced/deep retrieval policy routing with hard latency fail-closed behavior to prevent unbounded semantic-path stalls.
features.resource_cost: Additional recall routing logic and one deterministic fallback query path when latency budgets are exceeded.
features.rollback_strategy: Revert the policy-mode parser and fail-closed branch in recall handlers; restore prior budget-only mode mapping.
features.measurement: Track policyMode mix, latencyMs distribution, failClosed trigger frequency, and contradiction/task-success deltas from eval snapshots.

features.title: Eval snapshot metric expansion and regression gate payload
features.expected_gain: Adds baseline-vs-assisted task outcome metrics and richer memory-quality signals with machine-checkable regression gates.
features.resource_cost: Expanded SQL aggregation over feedback/events tables and additional CLI comparison logic for baseline snapshots.
features.rollback_strategy: Disable baseline comparison usage in workflows and revert eval snapshot shape additions if false positives appear.
features.measurement: Monitor gate pass/fail stability and compare assisted taskSuccessRate/firstPassSuccess alongside staleMemoryHitRate and lowTrustHitRate trends.
